text:
Monster Hunter Stories 3 Rudy story DLC expansion out on Nintendo Switch 2 today, trailer

During a presentation today, Capcom today pulled back the curtain on the story expansion for Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection, known as Additional Side Story: Rudy. It will be available on all platforms starting today, including Nintendo Switch 2. The DLC explores the origins of Rudy, the Royal Felyne. Players will also be able to challenge the Elder Dragon...

text:
Raccoin: Coin Pusher Roguelike announced for Nintendo Switch 2

Playstack and Doraccoon today announced Raccoin: Coin Pusher Roguelike for consoles, with Nintendo Switch 2 included in those plans. The port will be ready to go for this fall. You probably have some sort of idea what to expect based on the title alone. That said, Raccoin: Coin Pusher Roguelike is described as “a roguelike deckbuilder where you combine special...

text:
Nintendo announces 2026 Summer Sale for Switch 2 and Switch, here’s the full list of deals

Nintendo just went live with a new 2026 Summer Sale, which brings various discounts for Switch 2 and Switch. Titles are included here from both a first-party and third-party perspective. Additionally, you can save on individual games as well as DLC. From Nintendo, Zelda and Fire Emblem are represented well here. We also see the lowest prices ever for games...

text:
Unbeatable confirmed for Nintendo Switch 2, will have a physical release

Unbeatable is seeing release on Nintendo Switch 2, Playstack and D-Cell Games revealed today. The game launches on July 27, 2026. Unbeatable is an anime-inspired rhythm adventure game. In this world, music is illegal, and you’ll follow Beat and her band who are on the run. A whole bunch of extra information can be found in the following overview: Unbeatable...

text:
Resident Evil Requiem 1.3.1 update out now, patch notes

Capcom today issued the latest update for Resident Evil Requiem, which is version 1.3.1. The update is mainly for the recently-released Leon Must Die Forever mini-game. Difficulty has been lowered a bit and a few balance adjustments have been made The full rundown is as follows: Resident Evil Requiem version 1.3.1 update patch notes Fixed some minor issues. Reduced the...

text:
The Witch’s Bakery hits Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch this August, new trailer [update: specific date]

May 28: The Witch’s Bakery is almost here, with Silver Lining Interactive and Sunny Lab confirming that the game is launching this August. We know that the title is planned for Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. The specific release date should be provided soon. Silver Lining Interactive, a magical adventure RPG, was initially announced for Nintendo Switch last October. The...

text:

text:
Deltarune 0.0.0241 update announced, patch notes

A new update has been announced for Deltarune in the form of version 0.0.0241. Right now it’s only on PC / Mac, but consoles – including Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch – should follow soon.
